message:
🐛 Fix auth expiry test to use correct localStorage keys (#10565)

Fixes #10536

The test removed legacy keys (github_token, user) but the app reads
'token' for auth. Updated to clear all relevant auth keys and mock
SSE endpoints to return 401 for complete expiry simulation.
